zh.Stamford Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯坦福 布里奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir於1047年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson32歲，母親Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev15歲。她於大約1079年與Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin在曼島結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1086年9月25日在曼島享年39歲，埋葬在挪威。

zh-hans.Stamford Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯坦福 布里奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir于1047年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson32岁，母亲Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev15岁。她于大约1079年与Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin在曼岛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1086年9月25日在曼岛享年39岁，埋葬在挪威。

nameMeanings.name: Queen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Quene, sometimes a pet form of Quenill (Old English Cwēnhild, from cwēn ‘queen’ + hild ‘battle’). Early examples of the name are mainly from southern England, especially Sussex, but its currency in late medieval northern England has also been suggested by records from Yorkshire.
English: possibly a nickname from Middle English quene ‘woman; harlot; crone’ (Old English cwēn), but this is less likely than 2 to have given rise to a hereditary surname.

variants.name: McQueen
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Shuibhne ‘son of Suibhne’ a byname meaning ‘pleasant’. Compare McSweeney .

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Shuain, a Gaelic patronymic based on Old Norse sveinn ‘boy, servant’, which was also used as a personal name (see Swain ). This is given as the origin of the McQueen or McSwan family of Skye, although the spellings are hard to distinguish. Compare Whan .

nameMeanings.name: Ragnhild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

variants.name: Ragnild
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir was born in 1047, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson, was 32 and her mother, Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev, was 15. She married Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin about 1079, in Isle of Man. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 25 September 1086, in Isle of Man, at the age of 39, and was buried in Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir est née en 1047, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin environ 1079, à Île de Man. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 25 septembre 1086, à Île de Man, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir 1047 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson 32 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev 15. Sie hat um 1079 in Isle of Man Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 25. September 1086 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Isle of Man und wurde in Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir è nata il nel 1047 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin circa 1079, nel Isola di Man. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 25 settembre 1086, nel Isola di Man, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Norvegia.

ja.Østlandet, Norway: ノルウェーoストランデト
ja.lifeSummary: Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottirが1047年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdssonは32歳，母Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kievは15歳であった。約1079年にマン島でGodred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1086年9月25日にマン島で39歳で死去し，ノルウェーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir(이)가 1047년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1079년 맨섬에서 Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1086년 9월 25일 맨섬에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 노르웨이에 묻혔다.

mn.Kyiv: Київ, Київська область, Україна, Советтер Союз

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir nasceu em 1047, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin aproximadamente 1079, em Ilha de Man. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1086, em Ilha de Man, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Noruega.

ru.Kyiv: Киев, Киевская область, Украина, Советский Союз
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir родилась в 1047 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin около 1079 г. в местности Остров Мэн. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 25 сентября 1086 г. в местности Остров Мэн в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности Норвегия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Queen Ragnhild Maria Haraldsdottir nació en 1047, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Godred "Crovan" Haraldsson  King of the Isle of Man and of Dublin aproximadamente 1079, en Isla de Man. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1086, en Isla de Man, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Noruega.
